case_title: WILLIE KING VS. PENELOPE FRANK ET AL

DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL LEASE/RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING, WILLIE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, WILLIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANK, PENELOPE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3220 - 16TH STREET #7, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
